title: simpa Unscented Ivory Pillar Candles Smokeless Burn 100 Hour Burn Time 80mm x 200mm - Set of 4
features: Classic Ivory Design – Elegant unscented pillar candles in a soft ivory tone, perfect for enhancing décor in homes, weddings, or events with timeless charm.
Clean, Smokeless Burn – Designed with a cotton wick to deliver a clean, steady, and virtually smokeless flame, creating a calm and relaxing atmosphere.
Long Lasting Burn Time – Each candle is crafted for extended use, offering long burn durations ideal for dinner parties, festive décor, or daily use
Versatile Ambience Setter – Use to create cosy ambience on mantels, tables, or as part of centrepieces. Suitable for both decorative and emergency lighting.
Great Value Multipack Set - Sold in Set of XX candles. Approximate Dimensions - mm (H) x mm (Dia)
